_PURPOSE: Centralized AI brain for the LondonGithub project. Single source of truth for all accumulated knowledge, architecture, operational files, historical issues, and execution guidelines.

PROJECT_IDENTITY.project_name: London Strategic Framework — GitHub Pages Deployment
PROJECT_IDENTITY.description: A mobile-optimized HTML itinerary web application for a 3-day London trip (Sat May 30 – Mon Jun 1). Deployed as a static site on GitHub Pages for instant WhatsApp sharing.

ARCHITECTURE.hosting: GitHub Pages (free tier, deploy from branch)

tech_stack.html: Single index.html with embedded CSS and JS
tech_stack.css: Vanilla CSS with CSS custom properties (variables)

key_features: Interactive checklist with completion state (greyed-out cards)
3-button map grid per card (Location / Previous / Next)
Local dining recommendations with cost estimates

index.html.purpose: The entire application — HTML structure, CSS styles, and JS logic in a single file

MACHINE-MEMORY.json.purpose: Centralized AI brain — single source of truth for project context, history, and guidelines

DEPLOYMENT_PROCEDURE.step_1_prepare: Ensure index.html is saved at root of project folder
DEPLOYMENT_PROCEDURE.step_2_create_repo: Create PUBLIC repo 'london-itinerary' on GitHub (no README, no .gitignore, no license)
DEPLOYMENT_PROCEDURE.step_3_git_init: git init -b main in project folder
DEPLOYMENT_PROCEDURE.step_4_stage_commit: git add index.html && git commit -m 'Initial deploy of mobile london framework'
DEPLOYMENT_PROCEDURE.step_7_activate_pages: Settings > Pages > Deploy from branch > main > / (root) > Save
DEPLOYMENT_PROCEDURE.step_8_verify: Wait 30-60s, refresh Settings > Pages, confirm live URL

EXECUTION_LOG.details: Scanned project folder. Found single file: index.html (41556 bytes, 855 lines). No existing .git repository detected. No MACHINE-MEMORY.json existed. GitHub user confirmed as 'snowblack555' (Anjali Jose) via browser session.
EXECUTION_LOG.thinking: Need to create a fresh public GitHub repo named 'london-itinerary', initialize git locally, push the code, then activate GitHub Pages via the browser UI. Must NOT modify any other existing repos on this GitHub account.

EXECUTION_LOG.details: Created MACHINE-MEMORY.json as the centralized AI brain for this project.
EXECUTION_LOG.thinking: Establishing the single source of truth before any destructive operations begin. This ensures continuity if the process is interrupted.

EXECUTION_LOG.details: Will now: (1) Create public GitHub repo 'london-itinerary' via browser, (2) Initialize local git repo, (3) Stage and commit index.html + MACHINE-MEMORY.json, (4) Add remote origin, (5) Push to main, (6) Activate GitHub Pages via browser, (7) Verify live URL, (8) Update this log with results.
EXECUTION_LOG.thinking: Browser automation needed for repo creation and Pages activation since these are GitHub UI operations. Git CLI operations will be done via terminal. Must be careful to ONLY create a new repo, not touch any existing ones.

STRICT_EXECUTION_GUIDELINES.rule_1: NEVER modify, delete, or interact with any existing GitHub repositories. ONLY create and manage the 'london-itinerary' repo.
STRICT_EXECUTION_GUIDELINES.rule_2: Always update MACHINE-MEMORY.json BEFORE and AFTER any significant operation.
STRICT_EXECUTION_GUIDELINES.rule_3: Log all thinking, planned procedures, and outcomes in the EXECUTION_LOG array.
STRICT_EXECUTION_GUIDELINES.rule_4: If the process is interrupted, any new agent MUST read this file first to gain full situational awareness.
STRICT_EXECUTION_GUIDELINES.rule_5: The repository MUST be Public for GitHub Pages free tier to work.
STRICT_EXECUTION_GUIDELINES.rule_6: The deploy branch MUST be 'main' with source path '/ (root)'.
STRICT_EXECUTION_GUIDELINES.rule_7: After any push, verify the live GitHub Pages URL is responsive before marking deployment as complete.
